wood.wood: Two Wood spirits — you grow toward the same sun, roots quietly tangling.
wood.fire: Your Wood feeds their Fire — you make them blaze, they make you feel alive.
wood.earth: Your Wood reaches into their Earth — you push, they hold steady. Grounded growth.
wood.metal: Your Wood meets their Metal — they trim your wild branches. Sparks, then shape.
wood.water: Your Wood drinks their Water — they pour, you bloom. Easy, nourishing energy.

fire.wood: Your Fire is fed by their Wood — they hand you fuel, you light up the room together.
fire.fire: Your Fire meets their Fire — twin sparks that just get each other.
fire.earth: Your Fire warms their Earth — you bring the heat, they make it home.
fire.metal: Your Fire meets their Metal — you melt their cool exterior. Intense, transformative.
fire.water: Your Fire meets their Water — steam, tension, and undeniable pull.

earth.wood: Your Earth holds their Wood — you steady them, they keep you growing. Quiet teamwork.
earth.fire: Your Earth soaks up their Fire — they spark you, you give them somewhere to land.
earth.earth: Two Earth souls — solid, loyal, unshakeable. The kind that lasts.
earth.metal: Your Earth births their Metal — you ground them, they sharpen you. A natural fit.
earth.water: Your Earth meets their Water — you shape their flow, they soften your edges.

metal.wood: Your Metal meets their Wood — you cut through their tangle. Push-pull with purpose.
metal.fire: Your Metal meets their Fire — they melt you down and remake you. Risky, electric.
metal.earth: Your Metal is forged in their Earth — they ground you, you give them an edge.
metal.metal: Two Metal hearts — sharp minds, high standards, real respect when you click.
metal.water: Your Metal feeds their Water — you give them shape, they keep you flowing. Cool and clear.

water.wood: Your Water feeds their Wood — you pour, they bloom. You help each other grow.
water.fire: Your Water meets their Fire — opposites that sizzle. Cool meets heat, sparks fly.
water.earth: Your Water meets their Earth — they channel your flow. Steady banks for a restless current.
water.metal: Your Water is poured from their Metal — they shape you, you keep them shining. Smooth.
water.water: Two Water souls — deep, intuitive, flowing as one. You read each other without words.

tiers.high: You'd shine brightest side by side. ✨
tiers.mid: Different energies, real spark — worth the dance. 💫
tiers.low: Opposites that test each other — handle with care. 🌙
